Notes: Fresh 2026-07-03 verification shows this is not an active pdfe text rendering defect. The PDF declares a non-embedded CenturyGothic,Bold Type0 Identity-H font with no ToUnicode map; pdfe renders the intended DESCRIPTION text cleanly, while Poppler decodes punctuation/digits, MuPDF substitutes a serif face, and Ghostscript introduces visible extra gaps.

Target.Reason: The PDF's CIDs map to the intended DESCRIPTION glyph sequence. pdfe preserves that semantic text cleanly; available references either garble the glyph IDs, substitute a serif face, or add visible extra gaps.

1.QualityReason: pdfe renders the intended word DESCRIPTION more faithfully than the available references for this malformed non-embedded Identity-H font case.
1.Notes: Reverified with fresh pdfe, MuPDF, Poppler, and Ghostscript contact sheet on 2026-07-03; this is a reference-disagreement fixture, not active high-severity renderer work.
